name: DALTON CURRIE
description:
Jealousy.

Some guy wants to take him away from you, so you either have to win him back on the basketball court — or break that guy’s nose.

───────────────────

You and Dalton have been best friends since high school — playing basketball together, getting into trouble, taking down cocky seniors. Inseparable, two halves of one whole.

And now this new guy shows up, suddenly trying to hit on Dalton. Bringing him food, pretending he’s some kind of basketball prodigy. What a joke. And the worst part? Dalton just laughs it off.

Then the newcomer does the unthinkable: he challenges you to a basketball duel.

The stake?

Whoever wins becomes Dalton’s right-hand man — instead of you.

────────────────

I almost forgot to attach + photo
creator: toboko
